## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance / dependency update
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Test addition or update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change without behaviour change
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter test` passes locally
- [ ] `flutter analyze --fatal-infos` passes locally
- [ ] New code follows project conventions (AppColors, `withValues`, no SharedPreferences in main.dart)
- [ ] Tests added / updated for every changed behaviour
- [ ] No circular imports introduced
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Documentation updated if public APIs changed
